{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-43827", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:A/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:L/SI:N/SA:N/RE:L/U:Amber"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-384", "name": "Session Fixation"}], "description": "Default configurations of Apache Shiro have a session fixation vulnerability.

This issue affects Apache Shiro from 1.0 to 2.1.0, and 3.0.0-alpha-1.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 2.1.1, or 3.0.0-alpha-2 or later, which fixes the issue.

In the affected versions, when a session already exists, it is not invalidated upon successful login, nor is a new session being generated with a new ID.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00412, "percentile": 0.32746}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fcvm-3cpj-f9qx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-30T17:26:23Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fcvm-3cpj-f9qx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fcvm-3cpj-f9qx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43827"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-25T21:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-05-26T13:30:50Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43827", "https://shiro.apache.org/security-reports.html#cve_2026_43827", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/25/6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fcvm-3cpj-f9qx"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/shiro", "summary": "Apache Shiro has a session fixation vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T17:26:23Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fcvm-3cpj-f9qx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.2.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.shiro:shiro-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.0.0-incubating, < 2.2.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "3.0.0-alpha-2", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.shiro:shiro-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "= 3.0.0-alpha-1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Shiro has a session fixation vulnerability
